reviews.review_description:
Before the London update i could set up the plank and have the whole team bond by each taking turns to see who could even leave the elevator, let alone walk the plank.
Now I set it up, take the headset off and the plank needs resetting.
London looks great but you removed the fun when you removed the ability to share.
Please update (and make the building twice as high!)

This game is a huge scam and it’s really junky because the boundaries get screwed up. while you are waking off the plank you can just see your room. On top of that the game is maybe fun for 2 minutes then it gets boring. Even if the boundaries glitch was fixed the most I would pay for this would be $1.00. I tried to refund and they REJECTED MY REFUND and then I tried again and it said “inillegible for refund” DONT BUY. Not recommended

reviews.review_title: plank reset everytime the player changes
reviews.review_description:
I second the player who complains about the plank position reset when the headset is switched to another player.  

We are playing this experience in limited spaces in our houses. So it is very important to keep the set plank and elevator position even though the headset is switched to another player. Because an experienced player sets the play area and gets it ready for the inexperienced player, and when everything is reset, the surprise and game experience is ruined.

Please fix it.
ahhhl

reviews.review_title: Option to keep the plank stationary
reviews.review_description:
Using an actual plank heightens the realism of the game ten-fold IMO. Walking a plank  that's only 10-15mm (1/2 - 3/4") thick gives the illusion of height, as your feet overhang the 'gap' between plank & floor. 
But as "KlasSpel256" mentioned below, the lift position keeps changing when you hand the headset to another player. If you're just using the VR plank, that's not an issue, but when you align an actual plank with the VR one, it's a problem, as it keeps moving out of the initial alignment that mirrored the VR plank.
Please fix if you can.
simple and fun

reviews.review_title: position of plank is reset when change
reviews.review_description:
This could be the perfect party trick one walk the plank an dis casting to a TV then next person can do it.
The big problem position of plank and elevator is moving when headset is removed to be pass to next person and greeting in the real wall. So then you need to instruct how to config plank. I find a 7 years old redit threat about this problem.
Please fix a possibility to look position hard (on more button in the elevator) Please fix that and this will be a best part demo of VR  and i will give it a five star.
Scary

I’ve just bought this game not only for myself but then got charged again to gift it to my daughter on her profile. It’s not installed to my oculus and now on the app on my phone is asking me to pay for it again. Not happy as I’ve been charge £10 for a game I can’t even play

reviews.review_title: That’s it?!  What am I missing? Scam!
reviews.review_description: Paid $8 for maybe 2 minutes of fun?!  So, you just walk out 1-2 steps and that’s it?!!  I can’t believe that’s all there is to this. Do not buy…this should be free!!  No way this game is 4.6/5 stars…meta reviews apparently are bogus.

By far the best experience to put friends in, such funny reactions. It starts off in mixed reality. You have a lift that you need to walk into that is in your own space, hand tracking too 🙂. When the doors open that's the best bit. That first reaction is so good. Have your camera 🤳🏼 ready. I've taken my headset to work and everyone thought it's really good graphics, no one said about motion sickness. A lot won't even walk out, the funniest reactions. 
If you are a loner you may find it over priced for a very sort experience. 

Down sides.

Taking the headset off to swap with someone can throw out the position of the lift which is really frustrating. 

I found covering the sensor between the lens stops this but if it can be fixed in game it would be good. 

Tip
You have to set the boundaries a bit bigger than the plank area. Or will change to pass through. Not the games fault.

Some new locations please, even fictional places, have a dragon fly by over a volcano. Id pay a small fee for some dlc. 

Maybe if you got to the end of the plank, it could prompt you to put your hand out and a bird comes and lands on it. Just to give the game a little more content. 

But this is definitely one to have in your library and doesn't take up too much storage space.

If someone had bet me that they could show me a vr game that would make me so scared that I wouldn't be able to move forward in my own room I wouldn't have believed them...but this game did exactly that! I froze I was so scared the first time I played it! Now I love walking the plank! The sensation is unbelievable! I highly recommend this!
DON'T LIKE SPIDER

reviews.review_title: Small game with lots of love and care.
reviews.review_description:
This is a small and simple game, but it's priced fair, and the devs put a lot of love and care into it, especially visually with the graphical effort and environments. 
Though, you WILL need a lot of space to play this game. Not only is the elevator big, but you want the plank to really reach out if you want a tense experience.


My only two requests are these. More variety in environments, like nightime London, Tokyo Tower, Notre-Dame Paris, etc. This would be a LOT of work though, so I understand if it's not very possible. 
Second request would be more challenges and plank types. Like one with branching pathes you need to choose correctly, one that requires you to duck in time to dodge something, one that has swinging hazards that you have to time when to move across between the swings, etc. 
Hope the developers see these suggestions and consider it. Thank you for your hard work.
i paid $5 for this much of fun there was barely anything it's not even scary and i love the effort you put into this but give me my money back please

love the hands gesture without comtroller.  Wish there is a way to show feet.  now there are light shadows,which is good, but seeing feet and even legs would be even better.  we are going to tour London this year. The game is great for sight seeing too.

reviews.review_title: This is why I don’t play my vr
reviews.review_description:
I was playing walk the plank and I got so scared and started crying because it wouldn’t let me out. It wouldn’t let me out of the game no matter how many times I press the library but it just wouldn’t let me out. I was so scared and I didn’t play it. I uninstalled it three times but it wouldn’t let me out every time I joined it would just be a black screen. I don’t recommend this game. 
￼
I was hoping it would be scarier, maybe with better graphics (or even better, real world scenarios) it would work better.  It's a decent experience to show to my friends, but that's about it.
